calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Amended OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Vincenzo J. Signoretti pka. Arnold Luis Signoretti, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the Amended Petition for Change of Name to: Vincenzo Jason Signoretti.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-01-2007 Reset To May-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricai Abalos.
Petitioner: Jason Signoretti, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by counsel of record: Andrew Pierce.
Matter is continued to May 29, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. for appearance of attorney of record or sub-out.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-03-2007 Reset To May-01-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Petitioner: Jason Signoretti, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by counsel of record: Andrew Pierce.
Matter is continued to May 1, 2007 at 9:00 A.M.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Petitioner Robert Michael Selleck was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing the name to Vicenzo J. Signoretti. Decree signed in open court.
